heroDescription: Creative digital artist blending branding, illustration, web experiments, and queer punk visual storytelling.

aboutSection.title: Design, Code, And Loud Visuals.
aboutSection.summary: I’m Kyle De Vares, a multidisciplinary digital designer with experience in branding, illustration, web development, and creative media. From visual identity and digital artwork to coding interactive projects, I combine creativity and technical skills to build engaging digital experiences. I’m always exploring new tools, styles, and creative approaches that push my work further.

featuredSection.title: Featured Work
featuredSection.description: A selection of recent projects showcasing digital art, web development, and creative problem-solving.
